description_long: This is a beaded necklace featuring alternating black and white spherical beads, strung together in a symmetrical pattern. The necklace is displayed on a contoured, matte-finished display bust, which highlights the contrast between the dark and light beads. The central section of the necklace is accentuated by a rectangular cluster of black beads, creating a focal point. The beads appear to be made of polished plastic or glass, giving them a smooth and slightly glossy finish. The necklace is of moderate thickness and sits closely around the neck, suggesting a choker or collar style. The overall design is geometric and modern, with a balanced and visually striking motif.
description: A geometric beaded necklace with alternating black and white spherical beads, featuring a central rectangular black bead cluster. The design is modern and visually striking, displayed on a contoured bust.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full necklace with alternating black and white beads and a central rectangular black bead cluster.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the necklace's curvature and bead arrangement along the neckline.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the uniform row of black beads and the clasp area at the back of the necklace.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the necklace's profile and bead distribution.
